description: Self-hosted, plugin-driven media center platform for managing diverse media libraries with a unified interface

userStories.title: Initialize monorepo with Yarn workspaces
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the monorepo scaffolded with Yarn 1.22 workspaces so all packages can share dependencies and build together.
acceptanceCriteria: Root package.json with workspaces config pointing to apps/*, packages/*, plugins/*
Yarn 1.22 lockfile committed
Root tsconfig.json with strict mode, ESM, and project references
Biome config for linting and formatting
.nvmrc specifying Node 22.x LTS

userStories.title: Create shared package with core types and constants

acceptanceCriteria: packages/shared with package.json, tsconfig.json, ESM entry point
Core types: Library, DataSource, MediaItem, User, UserRole
Constants: default port (32400), media categories enum, user roles enum
Package exports configured correctly for ESM
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create media-types package with format definitions
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a @xon/media-types package defining all supported media categories, file extensions, and MIME mappings.

File extension to MIME type mapping for each category
File extension to media category mapping
Helper function to identify media category from file path
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

Configuration loading from .env via Node.js --env-file

acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/v1/auth/login — accepts username/password, returns JWT access token and refresh token
Access tokens are short-lived (15 minutes)
POST /api/v1/auth/refresh — refresh token rotation for new access token
POST /api/v1/auth/logout — invalidate refresh token
Auth middleware on all /api/v1/ routes (except /auth/*)

Tests pass
